{{Quote|You know the ''regulations'', Ninx…all repairs on Byss are performed by the ''Imperial Maintenance Corps''.|[[Byss Security]], to [[Shug Ninx]]|<ref name="World of the Ancient Sith" />}}
The '''Imperial Maintenance Corps''' was a group of [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] who had exclusive rights to all repairs required at the [[Imperial Freight Complex]]<ref name="Imperial Maintenance Corps" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] during [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] {{Mo}}
